_metadata.name: L1 - BitLocker Disk Encryption Baseline
_metadata.cisMapping: Device Encryption: OS drive + fixed data drive encryption, XTS-AES 256, deny write to unprotected removable drives
_metadata.rollback: Do NOT bulk-disable BitLocker to roll back — this triggers full decryption which is slow and leaves data unprotected during the window. Instead, pause the policy assignment (new devices unaffected) and handle already-encrypted devices case by case.
_metadata.impactNote: Silent/background encryption via Intune, no user-facing prompts. Devices with a TPM (virtually all managed hardware since ~2016) encrypt in the background with no measurable performance impact on modern SSDs.

name: ZeroTrust-L1-BitLocker-Baseline
description: Silent BitLocker encryption for OS and fixed data drives at XTS-AES 256, plus deny-write to non-BitLocker-protected removable drives. No pre-boot PIN at this tier (see L2 for startup authentication).
